title: Project ICBP
description: Oh, look a cute friendly penguin... OH, LOOK A PENGUIN CHARGING AT US!!!
body:
# Project Intercontinental Ballistic Penguin
[![Discord Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=5865F2)](https://discord.tophatcat.dev)
[![CurseForge Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=FF784D)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/project-icbp)
[![Modrinth Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=17B85A)](https://modrinth.com/mod/project-icbp)
[![Bluesky Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Bluesky-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=bluesky&logoColor=1185FE)](https://bsky.app/profile/tophatcat.dev)
[![Github Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=BBDDE5)](https://github.com/kiris-mods/project-icbp)
[![Website Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/tophatcat.dev-16181C?style=for-the-badge&logo=&logoColor=57Z29S)](https://tophatcat.dev/mods/project-icbp)

Oh look a cute friendly penguin... **OH LOOK A PENGUIN CHARGING AT US!!!**

Made for WinterJam 2024  
This mod adds a penguin friend that wanders around in snowy biomes, the mod is still WIP but once finished you will **NOT** want to be near them for very long unless you carry around some raw fish to feed them, that's the only way you'll survive!

![Image showcasing the Ballistic Penguin](https://tophatcat.dev/mods/project-icbp/ballistic-penguin.png)
